mapper.select:
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getCanCustTrgtList */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.CUSTOMER_ID , A.BAN , B.REQUEST_KEY , NVL(B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'UU') AS REQ_BUY_TYPE , C.SOC
, ( SELECT DISTINCT PAY_CL_CD FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = C.SOC AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' ) AS PAY_CL_CD FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST B , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO C
, MSP_BOND_MST E WHERE 1=1 AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8) < TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -6), 'YYYYMMDD') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = A.CUSTOMER_ID AND CONTRACT_NUM <> A.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB_STATUS <> 'C' ) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND C.APP_END_DATE = ( SELECT MAX(APP_END_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' ) AND C.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P'
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = E.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND E.FULL_PAY_YN(+) = 'Y' GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.CUSTOMER_ID, A.BAN, B.REQUEST_KEY, B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, A.PPPO, C.SOC, D.PAY_CL_CD

/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getPpsCustomer */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , SOC , SERVICE_TYPE , ENTER_DATE , STATUS_STOP_DT , STATUS_STOP_CD , STATUS_CANCEL_DT , STATUS_CANCEL_CD , BASIC_REMAINS , BASIC_EXPIRE , BASIC_EMPT_DT , VOICE_RATE , DATA_REG , DATA_REG_DT , DATA_MODE , DATA_SERVICE_CODE , DATA_QUOTA , DATA_QUOTA_REMAINS , DATA_VA_REMAINS , DATA_EXPIRE , DATA_LIMIT , LAST_KT_IN_MODE , LAST_KT_SYN_DT , LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT , LAST_DATA_CHG_DT , POINT , POINT_LAST_DT , US_LC_VOICE , US_LC_SMS , US_LC_DATA , US_LC_LAST_DATE , TOTAL_POINT , TOTAL_BASIC_CHG , TOTAL_BASIC_CNT , TOTAL_DATA_CHG , TOTAL_DATA_CNT , RECHARGE_FLAG , RECHARGE_FLAG_DT , SMS_PHONE , SMS_FLAG , RENTAL_STATUS , RENTAL_DT , VIR_ACCOUNT_ID , CMS_CHARGE_TYPE , CMS_BANK_CODE , CMS_ACCOUNT , CMS_USER_NAME , CMS_USER_SSN , CMS_CHARGE , CMS_TRY_REMAINS , CMS_CHARGE_DATE , CMS_CHARGE_MONTH , PAPER_IMAGE_1 , PAPER_IMAGE_2 , PAPER_IMAGE_3 , PAPER_IMAGE_4 , PAPER_IMAGE_5 , AD_NAME , AD_SSN , AD_ADDRESS , AD_NATION , LANG_CODE , WWW_REG_FLAG , WWW_REG_DT , AGENT_ID , AGENT_CH_DT , ADMIN_ID , ADMIN_CH_DT , REMARK , AGENT_SALE_ID , AGENT_SALE_ADMIN , AGENT_SALE_DATE , AGNT_DP_RCG_FLAG , AGNT_DP_RCG_REMAINS , AGNT_DP_RCG_CHARGE , RECHARGE_FLAG_ADMIN , SO_CD FROM PPS_CUSTOMER WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getPpsCustomerCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_PPS_CUSTOMER WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.insert:
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertCanPpsCustomer */
INSERT INTO CAN_PPS_CUSTOMER SELECT * FROM PPS_CUSTOMER WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getPpsCustomerKt */ SELECT ACT_CODE , TID , ENTER_DATE , TBL_NM , CUSTOMER_ID , BAN , CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSCRIBER_NO_OLD , SUBSCRIBER_NO , SVC_CNTR_NO , BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN , BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN , BAN_ADR_ZIP , BAN_LINK_NAME , BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID , BL_BILLING_METHOD , BL_SPCL_BAN_CODE , CNTR_USE_CD , COL_DELINQ_STATUS , CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD , CUSTOMER_ADR_PRIMARY_LN , CUSTOMER_ADR_SECONDARY_LN , CUSTOMER_ADR_ZIP , CUSTOMER_BAN , CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME , CUSTOMER_SSN , CUSTOMER_TYPE , DEALER_CODE , DRIVR_LICNS_NO , EFFECTIVE_DATE , EXPIRATION_DATE , FEATURE_CODE , G3_IND , ICC_ID , IMEI , IMSI , INBH_ID , INTM_SRL_NO , ITNET_BAL_YN , LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , LST_DEV_CHG_DATE , MARKET_GUBUN , MODEL_ID , MODEL_NAME , MVNO_YN , NCN , NCN_GRADE , OCCUPATION_CODE , REAL_USE_CUST_NO , SERVICE_TYPE , SLS_CMPN_CD , SOC , SOC_CCR_DISPLAY_IND , SRL_IF_ID , SUB_ADR_PRIMARY_LN , SUB_ADR_SECONDARY_LN , SUB_ADR_ZIP , SUB_LINK_NAME , SUB_STATUS , SUB_STATUS_DATE , SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD , SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE , SYS_CREATION_DATE , SYS_UPDATE_DATE , TAX_ID , USER_SSN , USIM_FXD_ID , WIBRO_IMEI , WIBRO_MAC_ID , WIFI_MAC_ID , EVNT_CD , EVNT_TRTM_CD , EVNT_TRTM_DT FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_KT WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getPpsCustomerKtCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_PPS_CUSTOMER_KT WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertCanPpsCustomerKt */ INSERT INTO CAN_PPS_CUSTOMER_KT SELECT * FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_KT WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} OR BAN = #{ban} OR CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspJuoAddInfo */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , SALORG_CD , OPEN_SHOP_CD , TRRM_SHOP_CD , CNTPNT_CD , SLS_PRSN_ID , TRTM_PRSN_ID , ENCR_PRSN_ID , SLS_NO , DVC_OFW_AMNT , INST_ORGIN_AMNT , INST_MNTH_CNT , EVNT_CD , EVNT_TRTM_NO , EVNT_TRTM_DT , APP_START_DD , APP_END_DATE , MODEL_NAME , MODEL_ID , ENGG_MNTH_CNT , SVC_CNTR_NO , GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO , MODEL_CHN_CD , BL_DC_TYPE , GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspJuoAddInfoCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertCanMspJuoAddInfo */ INSERT INTO CAN_MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO SELECT * FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspJuoBanInfo */ SELECT BAN , CUSTOMER_ID , COL_DELINQ_STATUS , MARKET_GUBUN , BL_BILLING_METHOD , BL_SPCL_BAN_CODE , BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID , BAN_ADR_ZIP , BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN , BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN , BAN_LINK_NAME , EVNT_CD , EVNT_TRTM_NO , EVNT_TRTM_DT FROM MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO WHERE BAN = #{ban}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspJuoBanInfoCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO WHERE BAN = #{ban}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertCanMspJuoBanInfo */ INSERT INTO CAN_MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO SELECT * FROM MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO WHERE BAN = #{ban}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspJuoBanInfoHist */ SELECT BAN , EVNT_CHANGE_DATE , EVNT_TRTM_DT , CUSTOMER_ID , COL_DELINQ_STATUS , MARKET_GUBUN , BL_BILLING_METHOD , BL_SPCL_BAN_CODE , BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID , BAN_ADR_ZIP , BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN , BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN , BAN_LINK_NAME , EVNT_CD , EVNT_TRTM_NO FROM MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO_HIST WHERE BAN = #{ban}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspJuoBanInfoHistCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO_HIST WHERE BAN = #{ban}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertCanMspJuoBanInfoHist */ INSERT INTO CAN_MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO_HIST SELECT * FROM MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO_HIST WHERE BAN = #{ban}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspJuoCusInfo */ SELECT CUSTOMER_ID , CUSTOMER_TYPE , CUSTOMER_SSN , DRIVR_LICNS_NO , TAX_ID , CUSTOMER_ADR_ZIP , CUSTOMER_ADR_PRIMARY_LN , CUSTOMER_ADR_SECONDARY_LN , CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME , OCCUPATION_CODE , CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD , EVNT_CD , EVNT_TRTM_NO , EVNT_TRTM_DT , REVOCATION_TYPE FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspJuoCusInfoCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertCanMspJuoCusInfo */ INSERT INTO CAN_MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO SELECT * FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspJuoCusInfoHist */ SELECT CUSTOMER_ID , CUSTOMER_TYPE , CUSTOMER_SSN , DRIVR_LICNS_NO , TAX_ID , CUSTOMER_ADR_ZIP , CUSTOMER_ADR_PRIMARY_LN , CUSTOMER_ADR_SECONDARY_LN , CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME , OCCUPATION_CODE , CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD , EVNT_CD , EVNT_TRTM_NO , EVNT_TRTM_DT , REVOCATION_TYPE , EVNT_CHANGE_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO_HIST WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspJuoCusInfoHistCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO_HIST WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertCanMspJuoCusInfoHist */ INSERT INTO CAN_MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO_HIST SELECT * FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO_HIST WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspRequestAgent */ SELECT REQUEST_KEY , MINOR_AGENT_NAME , MINOR_AGENT_RRN , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN , MINOR_AGENT_RELATION , JRDCL_AGENT_NAME , JRDCL_AGENT_RRN , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN , ENTRUST_REQ_NM , ENTRUST_RES_NM , ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION , ENTRUST_RES_RRN , ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN , ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN , ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN , SYS_RDATE , APP_INST_YN , INST_CNFM_ID , INST_CNFM_DTTM FROM MSP_REQUEST_AGENT WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspRequestAgentCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MSP_REQUEST_AGENT WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertMspRequestAgent */ INSERT INTO CAN_MSP_REQUEST_AGENT SELECT * FROM MSP_REQUEST_AGENT WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspRequestMove */ SELECT REQUEST_KEY , MOVE_COMPANY , MOVE_MOBILE_FN , MOVE_MOBILE_MN , MOVE_MOBILE_RN , MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER , MOVE_AUTH_TYPE , MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE , MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT , REQ_GUIDE_FLAG , REQ_GUIDE_FN , REQ_GUIDE_RN , REQ_GUIDE_MN , MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG , SYS_RDATE FROM MSP_REQUEST_MOVE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspRequestMoveCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MSP_REQUEST_MOVE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertMspRequestMove */ INSERT INTO CAN_MSP_REQUEST_MOVE SELECT * FROM MSP_REQUEST_MOVE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspRequestCstmr */ SELECT REQUEST_KEY , CSTMR_NAME , CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN , CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME , CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME , CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER , CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN , CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER , CSTMR_TEL_FN , CSTMR_TEL_MN , CSTMR_TEL_RN , CSTMR_MOBILE_FN , CSTMR_MOBILE_MN , CSTMR_MOBILE_RN , CSTMR_POST , CSTMR_ADDR , CSTMR_ADDR_BJD , CSTMR_ADDR_DTL , CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE , CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG , CSTMR_MAIL , CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN , OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG , OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM , OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN , OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION , OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM , SYS_RDATE , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH FROM MSP_REQUEST_CSTMR WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspRequestCstmrCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MSP_REQUEST_CSTMR WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertMspRequestCstmr */ INSERT INTO CAN_MSP_REQUEST_CSTMR SELECT * FROM MSP_REQUEST_CSTMR WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspRequestReq */ SELECT REQUEST_KEY , REQ_BANK , REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME , REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN , REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION , REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER , REQ_CARD_NAME , REQ_CARD_RRN , REQ_CARD_COMPANY , REQ_CARD_NO , REQ_CARD_YY , REQ_CARD_MM , REQ_WIRE_TYPE , SYS_RDATE , REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG , REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_FN , REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN , REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_RN FROM MSP_REQUEST_REQ WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspRequestReqCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MSP_REQUEST_REQ WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertMspRequestReq */ INSERT INTO CAN_MSP_REQUEST_REQ SELECT * FROM MSP_REQUEST_REQ WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspRequestChange */ SELECT REQUEST_KEY , NAME_CHANGE_NM , NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN , NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN , NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN , NAME_CHANGE_RRN , NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT , SYS_RDATE FROM MSP_REQUEST_CHANGE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspRequestChangeCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MSP_REQUEST_CHANGE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertMspRequestChange */ INSERT INTO CAN_MSP_REQUEST_CHANGE SELECT * FROM MSP_REQUEST_CHANGE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspRequestDlvry */ SELECT REQUEST_KEY , DLVRY_NAME , DLVRY_TEL_FN , DLVRY_TEL_MN , DLVRY_TEL_RN , DLVRY_MOBILE_FN , DLVRY_MOBILE_MN , DLVRY_MOBILE_RN , DLVRY_POST , DLVRY_ADDR , DLVRY_ADDR_BJD , DLVRY_ADDR_DTL , DLVRY_MEMO , SYS_RDATE , TB_CD FROM MSP_REQUEST_DLVRY WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspRequestDlvryCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MSP_REQUEST_DLVRY WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertMspRequestDlvry */ INSERT INTO CAN_MSP_REQUEST_DLVRY SELECT * FROM MSP_REQUEST_DLVRY WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMcpRequestAgent */ SELECT REQUEST_KEY , MINOR_AGENT_NAME , MINOR_AGENT_RRN , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN , MINOR_AGENT_RELATION , JRDCL_AGENT_NAME , JRDCL_AGENT_RRN , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN , ENTRUST_REQ_NM , ENTRUST_RES_NM , ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION , ENTRUST_RES_RRN , ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN , ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN , ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN , SYS_RDATE , MINOR_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN , MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE , MINOR_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT , MINOR_SELF_ISSU_NUM FROM MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMcpRequestAgentCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_CAN WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertMcpRequestAgent */ INSERT INTO CAN_MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_CAN SELECT * FROM MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMcpRequestMove */ SELECT REQUEST_KEY , MOVE_COMPANY , MOVE_MOBILE_FN , MOVE_MOBILE_MN , MOVE_MOBILE_RN , MOVE_AUTH_TYPE , MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER , MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE , MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT , MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG , SYS_RDATE , REQ_GUIDE_FLAG , REQ_GUIDE_FN , REQ_GUIDE_RN , REQ_GUIDE_MN FROM MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMcpRequestMoveCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_CAN WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertMcpRequestMove */ INSERT INTO CAN_MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_CAN SELECT * FROM MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMcpRequestCstmr */ SELECT REQUEST_KEY , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE , CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME , CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER , CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME , CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN , CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER , CSTMR_TEL_FN , CSTMR_TEL_MN , CSTMR_TEL_RN , CSTMR_MOBILE_FN , CSTMR_MOBILE_MN , CSTMR_MOBILE_RN , CSTMR_POST , CSTMR_ADDR , CSTMR_ADDR_DTL , CSTMR_ADDR_BJD , CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE , CSTMR_MAIL , CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG , CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN , OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG , OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM , OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN , OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION , OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM , SYS_RDATE , CSTMR_NAME , CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH , SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN , SELF_CERT_TYPE , SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT , SELF_ISSU_NUM FROM MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMcpRequestCstmrCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_CAN WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertMcpRequestCstmr */ INSERT INTO CAN_MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_CAN SELECT * FROM MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMcpRequestReq */ SELECT REQUEST_KEY , REQ_BANK , REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME , REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN , REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION , REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER , REQ_CARD_NAME , REQ_CARD_RRN , REQ_CARD_COMPANY , REQ_CARD_NO , REQ_CARD_YY , REQ_CARD_MM , REQ_WIRE_TYPE , SYS_RDATE , REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG , REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_FN , REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN , REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_RN FROM MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMcpRequestReqCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_CAN WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertMcpRequestReq */ INSERT INTO CAN_MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_CAN SELECT * FROM MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMcpRequestChange */ SELECT NAME_CHANGE_NM , NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN , NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN , NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN , NAME_CHANGE_RRN , NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT , REQUEST_KEY , SYS_RDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMcpRequestChangeCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_CAN WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertMcpRequestChange */ INSERT INTO CAN_MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_CAN SELECT * FROM MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMcpRequestDlvry */ SELECT REQUEST_KEY , DLVRY_NAME , DLVRY_TEL_FN , DLVRY_TEL_MN , DLVRY_TEL_RN , DLVRY_MOBILE_FN , DLVRY_MOBILE_MN , DLVRY_MOBILE_RN , DLVRY_POST , DLVRY_ADDR , DLVRY_ADDR_DTL , DLVRY_ADDR_BJD , DLVRY_MEMO , SYS_RDATE , TB_CD FROM MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMcpRequestDlvryCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_CAN WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertMcpRequestDlvry */ INSERT INTO CAN_MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_CAN SELECT * FROM MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspJuoSubInfo */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , CUSTOMER_ID , SUBSCRIBER_NO , SUB_STATUS , SUB_STATUS_DATE , SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE , USER_SSN , SUB_ADR_ZIP , SUB_ADR_PRIMARY_LN , SUB_ADR_SECONDARY_LN , SUB_LINK_NAME , MODEL_NAME , MODEL_ID , NCN , NCN_GRADE , IMSI , ICC_ID , G3_IND , DEALER_CODE , LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , LST_DEV_CHG_DATE , ITNET_BAL_YN , IMEI , SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD , SLS_CMPN_CD , INTM_SRL_NO , WIBRO_IMEI , WIBRO_MAC_ID , USIM_FXD_ID , CNTR_USE_CD , SVC_CNTR_NO , REAL_USE_CUST_NO , SRL_IF_ID , UNPD_IND_CD , MNP_IND_CD , INDV_ENTR_NO , INDV_ENTR_NM , EVNT_CD , EVNT_TRTM_NO , EVNT_TRTM_DT , SCAN_ID , ON_OFF_TYPE , DOBYYYYMMDD , GENDER , BAN , WIFI_MAC_ID , OPEN_AGNT_CD , PPPO , REG_DTTM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getCanMspJuoSubInfoCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertMspJuoSubInfo */ INSERT INTO CAN_MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SELECT * FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.select: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspJuoSubInfoHist */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , CUSTOMER_ID , SUBSCRIBER_NO , SUB_STATUS , SUB_STATUS_DATE , SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE , USER_SSN , SUB_ADR_ZIP , SUB_ADR_PRIMARY_LN , SUB_ADR_SECONDARY_LN , SUB_LINK_NAME , MODEL_NAME , MODEL_ID , NCN , NCN_GRADE , IMSI , ICC_ID , G3_IND , DEALER_CODE , LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , LST_DEV_CHG_DATE , ITNET_BAL_YN , IMEI , SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD , SLS_CMPN_CD , INTM_SRL_NO , WIBRO_IMEI , WIBRO_MAC_ID , USIM_FXD_ID , CNTR_USE_CD , SVC_CNTR_NO , REAL_USE_CUST_NO , SRL_IF_ID , UNPD_IND_CD , MNP_IND_CD , INDV_ENTR_NO , INDV_ENTR_NM , EVNT_CD , EVNT_TRTM_NO , EVNT_TRTM_DT , SOC , ON_OFF_TYPE , DOBYYYYMMDD , GENDER , EVNT_CHANGE_DATE , WIFI_MAC_ID , BAN , OPEN_AGNT_CD , PPPO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
/* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.getMspJuoSubInfoHistCnt */ SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM CAN_MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.insert: /* canCustTransferSchduleMapper.insertMspJuoSubInfoHist */ INSERT INTO CAN_MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST SELECT * FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
